center.name: 泰国南部地区
center.summary: 泰国南部地区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Gould's frogmouth，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: More precisely, it is found in Brunei, certain regions of Indonesia, Malaysia, Singapore, and in Southern Thailand

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: More precisely, it is found in Brunei, certain regions of Indonesia, Malaysia, Singapore, and in Southern Thailand
